BSc (Hons) Computer Science.req: ABB or 136 UCAS tariff points. Mathematics A-level at grade B or above required. GCSE Maths at grade 5 and English Language at grade 4.

BA (Hons) International Business.req: BBB or 120 UCAS tariff points. No specific A-level subjects required. GCSE English Language and Maths at grade 4. Modern language A-level or international work experience desirable.

BEng (Hons) Mechanical Engineering.req: BBB or 120 UCAS tariff points. Mathematics and Physics A-levels both required. GCSE Maths at grade 6.

BSc (Hons) Sport and Exercise Science.req: BBC or 112 UCAS tariff points. GCSE English Language and Maths at grade 4. Physical Education, Biology, or Sport Science A-level preferred.

BA (Hons) Criminology.req: BBC or 112 UCAS tariff points. No specific A-level subjects required. GCSE English Language and Maths at grade 4.

MPharm Pharmacy (4 years).req: AAB or 152 UCAS tariff points. Chemistry A-level at grade A required. Biology or Mathematics A-level preferred. GCSE Maths and English Language at grade 5. Interview required for all applicants.

BA (Hons) Graphic Design.req: BBC or 112 UCAS tariff points. Art, Design, or Media A-level preferred. Portfolio of creative work required and assessed before offer. GCSE English Language and Maths at grade 4.

BA (Hons) Media and Communications.req: BCC or 104 UCAS tariff points. Media, English, Film, or creative subject A-level preferred. GCSE English Language at grade 4. Personal statement should demonstrate genuine media interest.
